ratings.comment: The lectures were not very clear or seemingly well planned. The prof was very polite but my grade suffered from the lack of explanation when going through material. There were multiple times when he said- "if you don't understand... practice at home", not the most helpful. He was not afraid to answer questions one-on-one and again was very polite

While John was not awful, he definitely was not the best. He made many mistakes in lecture and was scatter brained at times. But he did a good job of delivering different ways to look at math, which I appreciated.
